title: Let Fish Love
description: Introduces fish breeding and eggs, allowing fish farms and also bulk fish transport through roe
body:
# **Let Fish Love**   , the way they deserve.

Breed fish using their favorite foods and watch as they lay Roe which will later hatch into small groups of fish! now you can set up fish farms and use fish more readily in the game. The Favorite foods of said fish are as follows
-  Pufferfish: Golden Carrot
-  Cod: Beetroot
-  Salmon: Sweet Berries
-  Tropical Fish: Melon

 **Additional Mod Support** [Let More Fish Love](https://modrinth.com/mod/letmorefishlove)
### Breed different colors of Tropical Fish! they will have the characteristics of their parents.
Check out another fish related mod, [Fishermen's Trap](https://modrinth.com/mod/fishermens-trap)
